en: When Jacob learned that there was grain for sale in Egypt, he said to his sons, "Why do you look at one another?"
zh: 雅各見埃及有糧食，就對兒子們說：“你們為甚麼彼此對望呢？”

en: And he said, "Behold, I have heard that there is grain for sale in Egypt. Go down and buy grain for us there, that we may live and not die."
zh: 他又說：“我聽說埃及有糧食，你們下到那裡去，給我們買些糧食，使我們可以活下去，不至餓死。”

en: So ten of Joseph's brothers went down to buy grain in Egypt.
zh: 於是，約瑟的十個哥哥就下去了，要從埃及買五穀。

en: But Jacob did not send Benjamin, Joseph's brother, with his brothers, for he feared that harm might happen to him.
zh: 但雅各並沒有打發約瑟的弟弟便雅憫與哥哥們同去，因為雅各說：“恐怕他會遇到災害。”

en: Thus the sons of Israel came to buy among the others who came, for the famine was in the land of Canaan.
zh: 以色列的眾子也在前來買糧的人群中，因為迦南地也有饑荒。

en: Now Joseph was governor over the land. He was the one who sold to all the people of the land. And Joseph's brothers came and bowed themselves before him with their faces to the ground.
zh: 當時治理埃及地的官長是約瑟，賣糧給那地所有的人民的就是他。所以，約瑟的哥哥們來俯伏在地向他下拜。

en: Joseph saw his brothers and recognized them, but he treated them like strangers and spoke roughly to them. "Where do you come from?" he said. They said, "From the land of Canaan, to buy food."
zh: 約瑟看見他的哥哥們，就認得他們，可是他裝作陌生人，對他們說嚴厲的話，問他們：“你們是哪裡來的？”他們回答：“我們是迦南地來買糧食的。”

en: And Joseph recognized his brothers, but they did not recognize him.
zh: 約瑟認得他的哥哥們，他們卻不認得他。

en: And Joseph remembered the dreams that he had dreamed of them. And he said to them, "You are spies; you have come to see the nakedness of the land."
zh: 約瑟想起從前所作關於他們的兩個夢，就對他們說：“你們是間諜，是來偵察本地的虛實。”

en: They said to him, "No, my lord, your servants have come to buy food.
zh: 他們對他說：“我主啊，不是這樣，僕人們實在是來買糧食的。

en: We are all sons of one man. We are honest men. Your servants have never been spies."
zh: 我們都是一個人的兒子，是誠實人；僕人們並不是間諜。”

en: He said to them, "No, it is the nakedness of the land that you have come to see."
zh: 約瑟對他們說：“不是的，你們實在是來偵察本地的虛實。”

en: And they said, "We, your servants, are twelve brothers, the sons of one man in the land of Canaan, and behold, the youngest is this day with our father, and one is no more."
zh: 他們說：“僕人們本是兄弟十二人，我們都是迦南地一個人的兒子。最小的現在與我們的父親在一起，還有一個不在了。”

en: But Joseph said to them, "It is as I said to you. You are spies.
zh: 約瑟對他們說：“我剛才對你們說：‘你們是間諜。’這話實在不錯。

en: By this you shall be tested: by the life of Pharaoh, you shall not go from this place unless your youngest brother comes here.
zh: 我要這樣試試你們：我指著法老的性命起誓，如果你們最小的弟弟不到這裡來，你們就決不得離開這裡。

en: Send one of you, and let him bring your brother, while you remain confined, that your words may be tested, whether there is truth in you. Or else, by the life of Pharaoh, surely you are spies."
zh: 你們可以派你們中間一個人回去，把你們的弟弟帶來；其餘的人都要囚禁起來，好證明你們的話真實不真實。如果不真實，我指著法老的性命起誓，你們就是間諜。”

en: And he put them all together in custody for three days.
zh: 於是，約瑟把他們收在監房裡三天。

en: On the third day Joseph said to them, "Do this and you will live, for I fear God:
zh: 到了第三天，約瑟對他們說：“我是敬畏 神的，你們要這樣作，就可以活著；

en: if you are honest men, let one of your brothers remain confined where you are in custody, and let the rest go and carry grain for the famine of your households,
zh: 如果你們是誠實人，就叫你們兄弟中一個人囚禁在監裡，你們其餘的人可以帶著糧食回去，解救你們家人的饑荒。

en: and bring your youngest brother to me. So your words will be verified, and you shall not die." And they did so.
zh: 然後把你們最小的弟弟帶到我這裡來，這樣，就可以證明你們的話是真實的，你們就不必死了。”他們就照樣作了。

en: Then they said to one another, "In truth we are guilty concerning our brother, in that we saw the distress of his soul, when he begged us and we did not listen. That is why this distress has come upon us."
zh: 他們彼此說：“我們在對待弟弟的事上實在有罪。他向我們求情的時候，我們看見他心裡的痛苦，卻不肯聽他，所以這次苦難臨到我們身上了。”

en: And Reuben answered them, "Did I not tell you not to sin against the boy? But you did not listen. So now there comes a reckoning for his blood."
zh: 流本回答他們，說：“我不是對你們說過：‘不要傷害那孩子’嗎？可是你們不肯聽，現在流他血的罪要向我們追討。”

en: They did not know that Joseph understood them, for there was an interpreter between them.
zh: 他們不知道約瑟聽得明白，因為他們中間有人當傳譯。

en: Then he turned away from them and wept. And he returned to them and spoke to them. And he took Simeon from them and bound him before their eyes.
zh: 約瑟轉身離開他們，哭了一陣，又回到他們那裡，與他們說話。然後從他們中間拉出西緬來，在他們眼前把他捆綁起來。

en: And Joseph gave orders to fill their bags with grain, and to replace every man's money in his sack, and to give them provisions for the journey. This was done for them.
zh: 約瑟吩咐人把五穀裝滿他們的袋，把他們的銀子放回各人的布袋裡；又給他們路上用的食物。一切就照樣辦了。

en: Then they loaded their donkeys with their grain and departed.
zh: 他們把糧食馱在他們的驢上，離開那裡去了。

en: And as one of them opened his sack to give his donkey fodder at the lodging place, he saw his money in the mouth of his sack.
zh: 到了住宿的地方，他們其中的一個人打開了布袋，要拿飼料餵驢的時候，才發現自己的銀子還在袋口那裡。

en: He said to his brothers, "My money has been put back; here it is in the mouth of my sack!" At this their hearts failed them, and they turned trembling to one another, saying, "What is this that God has done to us?"
zh: 於是對兄弟們說：“我的銀子都歸還了。你們看，就在我的布袋裡。”他們就心裡驚慌，彼此戰戰兢兢地說：“ 神向我們作的是甚麼呢？”

en: When they came to Jacob their father in the land of Canaan, they told him all that had happened to them, saying,
zh: 他們回到迦南地他們的父親雅各那裡，把他們遭遇的一切事都告訴了他，說：

en: "The man, the lord of the land, spoke roughly to us and took us to be spies of the land.
zh: “那地的主人對我們說了一些嚴厲的話，把我們當作偵察那地的間諜。

en: But we said to him, 'We are honest men; we have never been spies.
zh: 我們對他說：‘我們是誠實人，並不是間諜。

en: We are twelve brothers, sons of our father. One is no more, and the youngest is this day with our father in the land of Canaan.'
zh: 我們本是兄弟十二人，都是一個父親的兒子；有一個不在了，最小的現在與我們的父親一起在迦南地。’

en: Then the man, the lord of the land, said to us, 'By this I shall know that you are honest men: leave one of your brothers with me, and take grain for the famine of your households, and go your way.
zh: 那地的主人對我們說：‘我用這個辦法就可以知道你們是不是誠實人：你們兄弟中要留下一人在我這裡，其餘的人可以帶著糧食回去，解救你們家人的饑荒。

en: Bring your youngest brother to me. Then I shall know that you are not spies but honest men, and I will deliver your brother to you, and you shall trade in the land.'"
zh: 然後把你們最小的弟弟帶到我這裡來，我就知道你們不是間諜，而是誠實人了。這樣，我就把你們的兄弟交還給你們，你們也可以在這地自由來往。’”

en: As they emptied their sacks, behold, every man's bundle of money was in his sack. And when they and their father saw their bundles of money, they were afraid.
zh: 後來他們倒布袋的時候，不料各人的銀包仍然在各人的布袋裡。他們和他們的父親看見了銀包，就都懼怕起來。

en: And Jacob their father said to them, "You have bereaved me of my children: Joseph is no more, and Simeon is no more, and now you would take Benjamin. All this has come against me."
zh: 他們的父親雅各對他們說：“你們總是使我喪失兒子：約瑟沒有了，西緬也沒有了，你們還要把便雅憫帶走；每一件事都是針對我。”

en: Then Reuben said to his father, "Kill my two sons if I do not bring him back to you. Put him in my hands, and I will bring him back to you."
zh: 流本對他父親說：“如果我不把他帶回來給你，你可以殺死我的兩個兒子；只管把他交給我吧，我必把他帶回來給你。”

en: But he said, "My son shall not go down with you, for his brother is dead, and he is the only one left. If harm should happen to him on the journey that you are to make, you would bring down my gray hairs with sorrow to Sheol."
zh: 雅各說：“我的兒子不可與你們一同下去，因為他的哥哥死了，只剩下他一個；如果他在你們所走的路上遇到不幸，你們就使我這白髮老人愁愁苦苦地下陰間去了。”
